member.name: M:QualityGateService.Controllers.HealthController.Ready(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Kubernetes readiness probe. Checks PostgreSQL and RabbitMQ connectivity.

member.name: M:QualityGateService.Controllers.QualityGateController.Evaluate(QualityGateService.Models.ScanEvent,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Evaluates normalized findings and returns the quality gate decision.

member.name: M:QualityGateService.Controllers.QualityGateController.Rollback(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Triggers rollback for the specified Kubernetes deployment.
